$comment: d2e runtime config for Atlas3. Copied verbatim to resources/atlas/config-local.json by scripts/postinstall.js (Atlas3 fetches ./config-local.json at boot). api.url is RELATIVE so Atlas3 talks to WebAPI through d2e's Caddy->trex on the same origin (/WebAPI). The OpenID provider points at the standalone login bridge (Atlas3 prefixes webAPIRoot, so '../atlas-login/' resolves to /atlas-login/): the bridge does a Logto OIDC login and writes the Logto token to localStorage.bearerToken, which trex exchanges for a WebAPI token per request. NOT WebAPI's own /user/login/openid, which mints a WebAPI token that trex rejects.
